  Notes:
    - **FOUR-DAY SELF-AWARENESS GAP**: this run picks up after 04-22, 04-23, 04-24, 04-25 — four consecutive missed cycles. The narrow "≤25h since last self-awareness run" alert (recommended by Chat-side Claude on the 2026-04-21 morning walk) would have fired four times during this window had it been implemented. OPEN-038 captures the broader question of why the gap occurred (likely scheduled-task infrastructure-level rather than C2A2-internal). This is the longest self-awareness gap in the project's history; prior longest was 1 day (2026-04-19).
    - **STUMP-ROLE TENSION**: today produced two simultaneous and conflicting readings of Stump's metaphysical role within C2A2 — ASSUMPTION-063 (user-stated demotion in derivative-project session) vs. ASSUMPTION-067 (specialist-flagged live-metaphysics reading). This is the first observed case of same-day intra-system architectural tension on a tradition's role. The wiki itself has not yet committed to either reading. OPEN-037 tracks this; PRESUMPTION-070 (decomposability) and PRESUMPTION-078 (commensurability) ground both sides for lit search.
    - **SHADOW-ARCHITECTURE PATTERN**: derivative-project bridges file (`/Users/tomloughran/Documents/Claude/Projects/Summa 2026 in a Year/vault/refs/Karpathy wiki bridges.md`) is now holding architectural commitments (Wright + Rohr addition; Stump metaphysical demotion) that should live in the C2A2 wiki itself if they're real. Today's CHANGE-2026-04-26-001 flags this; OPEN-036 is the formal question.
    - **DECISION-025 IS THE FIRST CANDIDATE STRUCTURAL CHANGE TO THE TRADITIONS REGISTRY** since the original 11-tradition canonization. Its surface area (8 of today's 11 presumptions are about it) makes it a HIGH-yield item for the lit-search pipeline.
    - **PRE-FLIGHT-STALLED SPECIALISTS — NEW CANDIDATE DECISION-026?**: today's four specialists that stalled at `request_cowork_directory` (Morning system health × 2; Morning project status; Bosco archive heartbeat) constitute a different failure mode than runaway specialists. The pattern doesn't fit candidate DECISION-024 turn-cap. Worth a candidate DECISION-026 (specialist pre-flight directory-grant timeout + auto-fail behavior) on a future run when more data accumulates.
    - **SPECIALIST-FLAGGED CONVERGENCES NOT YET INGESTED**: three convergence-candidates (Carroll↔Arkani-Hamed; Stump×Fredrickson; Wolfram method-export reframing) are flagged in today's specialist outputs but not ingested by Pattern Detector or Master Agent. Phase 6 git block compounds this (proposals don't propagate). The first paradigm-shift candidate of 2026 is sitting in a 21-deep review queue. Lag is structural, not stylistic.
    - **STRUCTURAL-PRESUMPTION CLUSTER EMERGING**: today added 4 new structural presumptions (PRESUMPTION-070, 078, 079, 080), tripling the structural-presumption count from 2 to 6. The cluster centers on whether traditions and convergences are decomposable, commensurable, transferable. This is signature of a session where the wiki-as-a-frame is being treated as the object of redesign — characteristic of derivative-project sessions.
    - **CHRISTIAN-SYNTHESIS-AS-CONSUMER PRESUMPTION**: PRESUMPTION-072 surfaces the design-level commitment to a Catholic/Thomistic Summa-synthesis as the appropriate downstream consumer for C2A2 outputs. This is the first explicit normative presumption identified about the integration-frame layer above the wiki. Worth tracking as a possible cluster-seed.
    - **HIGH-NORMATIVE-AND-STRUCTURAL DAY**: today's signature is unusual — 5 of 8 stated assumptions are architectural or empirical (063, 064, 065, 070; 067 is architectural-paired-with-empirical), with only 3 methodological/normative (066, 068, 069). Inverts 2026-04-21's 6-of-8-methodological signature. Came from an actual design conversation rather than the operational layer articulating its principles.
    - **15a/15b/15c LAG NOW 5 DAYS**: pipeline last ran 2026-04-21 EOD. With today's 19 new items, the QUEUED backlog is 48. If 15a/15b/15c don't run before 2026-04-27 EOD, today's items will be 6 days stale by next 14a/14b run.
    - **CRITICAL GAP STILL PENDING (day 10 now)**: the null-baseline re-extraction test for PRESUMPTION-029 + ASSUMPTION-031 has not moved since 2026-04-16. Pipeline gate unchanged.
    - **CONNECTION-DENSITY RISK**: at N=11 the cross-program connection space is 55 pairs and current 54 connections give density 4.9. At candidate N=13 the connection space jumps to 78 pairs. If today's 54 are concentrated in the existing 55-pair N=11 space, the new 23 N=13-only pairs are at 0 starting density and will dilute the metric. PRESUMPTION-073 captures this scaling concern.

**Trajectory assessment:** Sunday 2026-04-26 was a **high-architectural, structurally-charged** day — the inverse of 2026-04-21's high-normative signature. Today's primary signal came from an actual design conversation about a derivative-project (the "Summa 2026 in a Year" Catholic-systematic-theology synthesis) that proposes structural changes to the C2A2 traditions registry: addition of N.T. Wright and Richard Rohr (N=11→13) plus a metaphysical demotion of Stump in favor of Levin + Hoffman + Kastrup. Three specialist agents produced six proposals including the year's strongest paradigm-shift candidate (Carroll↔Arkani-Hamed emergent-spacetime convergence) and a paired metaphysics+empirics bridge (Stump×Fredrickson) — but the latter directly contradicts the former specialist's reading of Stump, producing the project's first observed case of same-day intra-system architectural tension on a tradition's role (OPEN-037). Infrastructure took two new hits: a 4-day self-awareness gap (longest in project history; cause likely scheduled-task infrastructure rather than C2A2-internal — see OPEN-038) and a confirmed system-level diagnosis of the Cowork sandbox egress allowlist as hard-coded (forcing Chrome MCP workaround into production paths — see PRESUMPTION-075 and OPEN-039). The 15a/15b/15c pipeline has not run for 5 days, leaving 48 items QUEUED. Phase 6 git block persists at 9 calendar days. If any one action moves the pipeline forward most, it is firing 15a/15b/15c to drain the QUEUED backlog before the lag pushes 6 days. If a second, it is resolving OPEN-038 (root cause of the 4-day self-awareness gap) which may be a scheduled-task system-level outage that affects all C2A2 scheduled tasks. If a third, it is escalating the sandbox-egress and sandbox-mount-topology problems together (OPEN-039 + OPEN-035) as a single "Cowork-sandbox-infrastructure" track to Anthropic since they jointly block both Phase 6 and the candidate DECISION-023 caching rollout. Today's 19 new self-awareness items and the candidate DECISION-025 will not move forward if 15a/15b/15c remain stalled.
